createShare(string,string,uint8,address,.details: Requires SHARE_DEPLOYER_ROLEFor role values, see Governance.sol constantsIf _irs is zero, TREXFactory will deploy a fresh IRS; otherwise IRS must be owned by TREXFactoryfunction automatically adds salesManager as a token agentIf _irs is zero, TREXFactory will deploy a fresh IRS; otherwise IRS must be owned by TREXFactory

params._irs: Optional shared IdentityRegistryStorage address (0 to deploy new)
params._issuerClaims: Per-issuer allowed claim topics (length must match issuers)
params._maxSupply: Circulating supply cap for the share; must be greater than zero
params._owner: Owner of all deployed share contracts

deployShareSuite(string,(address,string,.details: Requires ADMIN_ROLECaller must be owner and this contract must own TREXFactoryfunction automatically adds salesManager as a token agent

params._salt: Plain salt string; owner() will be appended internally for uniqueness
params._tokenDetails: Token parameters (see ITREXFactory.TokenDetails), except tokenAgents <= 4 (salesManager is added automatically)

createShare(string,string,uint8,address,.notice: Deploy a new token suite (share) with minimal required parameters

deployShareSuite(string,(address,string,.notice: Forward deployment to TREXFactory with a custom salt

editMaxSupplyModule(address).notice: Set the MaxSupplyModule implementation used for new share deployments

idToShare(uint256).notice: Returns the address of the share

isContractTrexFactoryOwner().notice: Returns true if this contract is the owner of TREXFactory

maxSupplyModule().notice: Returns the currently configured MaxSupplyModule implementation address

salesManagerAddress().notice: Returns the SalesManager address automatically added as token agent

shareIdIndex().notice: Returns the index of the share

shareToId(address).notice: Returns the ID of the share

trexFactory().notice: Returns the address of the TREXFactory
